description: Indicator Center Enterprise Monitoring UX definitions for a compact full-width map-free cockpit with plain-language labels, labeled charts, and manually resizable drilldowns using existing CFS data only.

indicators.title: Development Activity Monitor
indicators.label: Development Activity
indicators.meaning: Observed permit and new construction activity can show where development review activity is already happening.
indicators.caveat_full: Observed permit/development activity only. Not prediction.
indicators.caveat: Observed activity only. Not a prediction.
indicators.recommended_action_full: Review underlying permit records and development hotspot context before formal planning decisions.
indicators.recommended_action: Review underlying permit records and development hotspot context before formal planning decisions.
indicators.recommended_follow_up: Review underlying permit records and development hotspot context before formal planning decisions.

indicators.title: Floodplain Review
indicators.label: Floodplain Review
indicators.front_page_sublabel: Special Flood Hazard Area / Floodway context
data_source_basis: Floodway / Special Flood Hazard Area / constrained parcel context
indicators.meaning: Flood review indicators help identify areas where staff may need floodplain due diligence.
indicators.caveat_full: FEMA floodplain data remains authoritative for regulatory flood context.
indicators.recommended_action_full: Confirm Floodway, Special Flood Hazard Area, and local floodplain requirements during formal review.
indicators.recommended_action: Confirm Floodway, Special Flood Hazard Area, and local floodplain requirements during formal review.
indicators.recommended_follow_up: Confirm Floodway, Special Flood Hazard Area, and local floodplain requirements during formal review.

indicators.title: School Capacity Watch
indicators.label: School Capacity Watch
indicators.meaning: School assignment and preliminary utilization context are available, but official capacity/enrollment is still needed.
indicators.caveat_full: Preliminary utilization from planning materials. Confirm with official enrollment and capacity.
indicators.caveat: Preliminary utilization from planning materials. Confirm with official enrollment and capacity.
indicators.recommended_action_full: Request official school capacity and enrollment before making capacity statements.
indicators.recommended_action: Request official school capacity and enrollment before making capacity statements.
indicators.recommended_follow_up: Request official school capacity and enrollment before making capacity statements.

indicators.title: Infrastructure & Utility Readiness
indicators.label: Utility / Infrastructure
indicators.meaning: Service-readiness and infrastructure context can guide review questions, but it does not prove capacity.
indicators.caveat_full: Utility proxy does not confirm available capacity.
indicators.caveat: Utility proxy does not confirm available capacity.
indicators.recommended_action_full: Confirm true capacity, allocation, and service constraints with WSACC or the relevant utility provider.
indicators.recommended_action: Confirm true capacity, allocation, and service constraints with WSACC or the relevant utility provider.
indicators.recommended_follow_up: Confirm true capacity, allocation, and service constraints with WSACC or the relevant utility provider.

indicators.title: Model Status
indicators.label: Model Research
indicators.meaning: Internal research signal and model readiness context can guide questions but cannot be used as official predictions.
indicators.caveat_full: No exact parcel probabilities. Not public-facing. Not production-ready.
indicators.caveat: No exact parcel probabilities. Not public-facing. Not production-ready.
indicators.recommended_action_full: Use relative research signal to guide questions, then rely on source records and staff review.
indicators.recommended_action: Use relative research signal to guide questions, then rely on source records and staff review.
indicators.recommended_follow_up: Use relative research signal to guide questions, then rely on source records and staff review.

indicators.title: Data Still Needed
indicators.label: Data Still Needed
indicators.meaning: Known missing datasets show what CFS needs before stronger operational conclusions can be made.
indicators.caveat_full: Do not overclaim until official data is received.
indicators.recommended_action_full: Prioritize WSACC capacity, official school capacity/enrollment, rezoning records, development pipeline, future land use, planned local road projects, and planned utility extensions.
indicators.recommended_action: Prioritize WSACC capacity, official school capacity/enrollment, rezoning records, development pipeline, future land use, planned local road projects, and planned utility extensions.
indicators.recommended_follow_up: Prioritize WSACC capacity, official school capacity/enrollment, rezoning records, development pipeline, future land use, planned local road projects, and planned utility extensions.
